question: Will this market get between 50-100 unique traders?
reason: Recent data shows significant growth in prediction market participation, with over 800,000 unique wallets monthly.
evidence: Prediction markets reached $25.7 billion in monthly volume in March 2026, with over 80% of users classified as retail traders—defined as those transacting less than $10,000.
Kalshi alone generated $263.5 million in fee revenue on $22.9 billion of volume in 2025.
Polymarket surpassed $3 billion in monthly volume by October 2025.
Kalshi raised over $1 billion at a $22 billion valuation in March 2026, making it the highest-valued prediction market platform.
Mid-frequency traders (11 to 1,000 fills) account for 44.7% of all prediction market trades, per TRM Labs.
Market makers with over 10,000 fills represent 35.2% of trading activity on prediction platforms.
searchQueries: number of unique traders prediction markets typical trading volume
